    U

    UiPrivacy - Class in com.sait.workshop05.util
    Hides UUID-shaped identifiers from user-visible strings where policy is to avoid exposing raw ids.
    unitPrice - Variable in class com.sait.workshop05.api.OrderApi.ItemJson
     
    update(int, Bakery) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.BakeryApi
    Updates one bakery row by id.
    update(int, String, int, Integer, BigDecimal) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.RewardTierApi
    Replaces one reward tier by id and returns the updated row.
    update(String, String, int, int, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.EmployeeApi
    Updates one employee profile by employee id.

    updateProductSpecial(int, int, String, double) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.CatalogApi
    PUT /api/v1/product-specials with id in the path replaces the whole special row.

    Uploads one bakery image through the admin bakery image route.
    uploadProductImage(int, File) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.ImageUploadApi
    POST multipart image for one product.
    User - Class in com.sait.workshop05.models
    Login user stub with JavaFX properties for session and compatibility with legacy integer user ids.

    Initializes JavaFX properties used by login session state.

    UserInitialsHelper - Class in com.sait.workshop05.util
    Builds two letter style initials for avatars for example JD for John Doe or NM for Noah Martin.
